Video.summary: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Video.summary: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes
Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes
Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

Video.summary: Jaclyn joins Mark in a ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific tornado season on record.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Video.summary: Destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds are only two elements Mark and Jaclyn encounter when storm hunting.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit

Video.summary: Flames Fill the sky. An entire city flees in terror. Firefighters bravely rush in.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Fires of Fort McMurray

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Fires of Fort McMurray
Storm Hunters | Fires of Fort McMurray
Storm Hunters | Fires of Fort McMurray

Video.summary: Those that thrive beneath the waves teach us to go with the flow.

WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.13
